policy: Append-only product detail evidence. These cases are injected below product detail content and never change product listing or homepage layout.

custom-tamper-evident-hyaluronic-acid-in.caseTitle: Serialized injection box RFQ case reference
custom-tamper-evident-hyaluronic-acid-in.dimension: Custom syringe carton dieline; cavity and leaflet space confirmed from the buyer's syringe tray or reference sample.
custom-tamper-evident-hyaluronic-acid-in.material: 300gsm-400gsm SBS/C1S pharmaceutical carton board with tamper-evident closure area.
custom-tamper-evident-hyaluronic-acid-in.industry: Medical aesthetics, hyaluronic acid injections, pre-filled syringe distribution.
custom-tamper-evident-hyaluronic-acid-in.sampleBefore: Initial artwork normally arrives with barcode, batch and expiry zones but no verified carton locking tolerance.
custom-tamper-evident-hyaluronic-acid-in.sampleAfter: Sampling focuses on GS1/DataMatrix scan readability, tamper-evident closure fit, insert compatibility and clean medical print finish.
custom-tamper-evident-hyaluronic-acid-in.decisionTip: Confirm barcode grade, syringe tray size and regulatory text zones before plate making.

child-resistant-secure-sliding-drawer-bo.dimension: Custom drawer box size; inner tray and pull clearance are adjusted around vial, ampoule or meso-cocktail kit dimensions.
child-resistant-secure-sliding-drawer-bo.material: Rigid greyboard with printed art paper wrap and optional security label area.
child-resistant-secure-sliding-drawer-bo.industry: Clinic presentation packs, meso-cocktails, ampoule kits and serialized medical aesthetic sets.
child-resistant-secure-sliding-drawer-bo.sampleBefore: Early samples often need locking pressure, pull-tab position and tray tolerance adjustments.
child-resistant-secure-sliding-drawer-bo.sampleAfter: Approved samples check drawer sliding force, child-resistant feature alignment, code placement and product cavity stability.
child-resistant-secure-sliding-drawer-bo.decisionTip: Send product weight and intended locking method so the drawer does not feel loose or too tight.

premium-anti-counterfeiting-magnetic-gif.caseTitle: Anti-counterfeit magnetic gift box case reference
premium-anti-counterfeiting-magnetic-gif.dimension: Custom rigid box size; insert cavity is matched to bottle, vial, syringe or medical aesthetic kit components.
premium-anti-counterfeiting-magnetic-gif.material: 1200gsm-1800gsm greyboard, wrapped specialty paper, magnetic closure and destructible void seal option.
premium-anti-counterfeiting-magnetic-gif.industry: Luxury medical aesthetics, premium clinic gifting, skincare and anti-counterfeit retail kits.
premium-anti-counterfeiting-magnetic-gif.sampleBefore: Concept samples usually compare magnetic closure strength, insert fit and security label position.
premium-anti-counterfeiting-magnetic-gif.sampleAfter: Final sample approval checks seal break behavior, foil/embossing registration, lid alignment and unboxing presentation.
premium-anti-counterfeiting-magnetic-gif.decisionTip: Choose assembled or collapsible structure early because it changes freight volume and cost.

wholesale-reverse-tuck-end-pharmaceutica.caseTitle: Tamper-evident reverse tuck carton case reference
wholesale-reverse-tuck-end-pharmaceutica.dimension: Custom reverse tuck carton dieline; panel width and tear-strip position are set around tablet, capsule or OTC product size.
wholesale-reverse-tuck-end-pharmaceutica.material: 300gsm-400gsm ivory board, SBS or pharmaceutical carton board.
wholesale-reverse-tuck-end-pharmaceutica.industry: OTC medicine, supplement cartons, tablet boxes and capsule packaging.
wholesale-reverse-tuck-end-pharmaceutica.sampleBefore: Before approval, buyers usually need dosage panel spacing, batch/expiry area and tear-strip direction checked.
wholesale-reverse-tuck-end-pharmaceutica.sampleAfter: Approved sample validates opening force, text legibility, barcode area and packing speed on the buyer's line.
wholesale-reverse-tuck-end-pharmaceutica.decisionTip: Provide final regulatory copy before sampling to avoid changing panel layout after print proof.

gs1-compliant-straight-tuck-tamper-proof.dimension: Custom straight tuck carton for eye-drop bottle, vial or small clinical kit dimensions.
gs1-compliant-straight-tuck-tamper-proof.material: 350gsm SBS/C1S pharmaceutical paperboard with medical clean print finish.
gs1-compliant-straight-tuck-tamper-proof.industry: Eye drops, clinical vials, ophthalmic care and small medical kits.
gs1-compliant-straight-tuck-tamper-proof.sampleBefore: Initial dieline checks focus on bottle height, leaflet space and GS1 code panel placement.
gs1-compliant-straight-tuck-tamper-proof.sampleAfter: Final sample verifies tuck lock strength, code readability, anti-scuff finish and carton squareness after assembly.
gs1-compliant-straight-tuck-tamper-proof.decisionTip: Send bottle dimensions and barcode file together; this reduces prepress revisions.

eco-friendly-tamper-evident-mailer-box-s.dimension: Custom corrugated mailer size; inside clearance depends on bottle count, dunnage and shipping method.
eco-friendly-tamper-evident-mailer-box-s.material: E-flute/F-flute corrugated board with kraft or white outer liner and self-seal tear strip.
eco-friendly-tamper-evident-mailer-box-s.industry: Supplements, vitamins, wellness kits and ecommerce shipments.
eco-friendly-tamper-evident-mailer-box-s.sampleBefore: Prototype checks usually compare box depth, tear strip direction and bottle movement during transit.
eco-friendly-tamper-evident-mailer-box-s.sampleAfter: Approved sample confirms self-seal adhesion, opening experience, edge crush resistance and inside print alignment.
eco-friendly-tamper-evident-mailer-box-s.decisionTip: Confirm product weight and shipping lane before choosing board flute.

serialized-book-style-multi-pack-present.dimension: Custom book-style rigid box; multi-pack cavity layout is based on sachet, vial, bottle or ampoule count.
serialized-book-style-multi-pack-present.material: Rigid greyboard with specialty paper wrap, ribbon pull and optional foam/EVA/paper insert.
serialized-book-style-multi-pack-present.industry: Premium collagen, wellness supplements, clinic gift sets and health product bundles.
serialized-book-style-multi-pack-present.sampleBefore: Before approval, insert cavity depth and flap closure feel are usually adjusted.
serialized-book-style-multi-pack-present.sampleAfter: Final sample checks lid alignment, serialized code placement, insert retention and premium finish consistency.
serialized-book-style-multi-pack-present.decisionTip: Send exact product count and display order so the insert layout supports the intended unboxing sequence.

serialized-medical-device-hanging-box-se.caseTitle: Medical device hanging box case reference
serialized-medical-device-hanging-box-se.dimension: Custom hanging carton size with euro slot; perforation line and panel strength are matched to retail display weight.
serialized-medical-device-hanging-box-se.material: 300gsm-400gsm SBS/C1S white board with optional tamper label area.
serialized-medical-device-hanging-box-se.industry: Diagnostic kits, rapid tests, medical device accessories and retail health products.
serialized-medical-device-hanging-box-se.sampleBefore: Early samples verify euro slot strength, perforation line position and device accessory fit.
serialized-medical-device-hanging-box-se.sampleAfter: Approved sample checks hanging load, barcode/QR readability, carton locking and retail display presentation.
serialized-medical-device-hanging-box-se.decisionTip: Provide product hanging weight and shelf display method before finalizing board thickness.
